english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response: First, we think about a group of people who all want to get the most good for themselves. Each person looks at what they can do to make their own life better or get more things. Second, we see that when each person makes this choice, they are only looking at their own needs and not the needs of the whole group. Third, we look at what happens when many people do this at the same time. If every person takes more than they need or uses things in a way that only helps them, the things that everyone needs might run out. The step after the third step shows that when many people do this, the whole lot of good for the whole group goes down even though each person tried to get more. The step after that shows that this happens because the choices of one person change the world for everyone else in a bad way. Finally, we see that when everyone acts only for themselves, the end state is a place where everyone is worse off than they would be if they worked together.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response: First, we look at what a person does in their life. We see that a person does many things every day. Some things are good and some things are not good. When a person does a good thing, it is a single act. This act might not change who that person is inside. Second, we look at what happens when a person does the same good thing many times. If a person helps others many times, it becomes a way of being. The person starts to feel that being good is how they act. Third, we see how these many acts change the mind and the heart. Doing good things makes the person feel good and makes them want to do more. This creates a circle where the good acts lead to more good acts. Finally, we can say that a person is not just one thing they do. A person is the whole of all the things they do most of the time. When the things a person does most of the time are good, then the person is a good person.

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
First, we look at the hard job of making choices. Sometimes we must pick between two things that are both good or both bad. This can be very hard. To help with this, some people make their own set of ways to think. They build a way to help them know what to do when they are not sure. This way to think helps them know what to do. The hard question here is how to make this way to think so it works well for every hard choice. We want the way to think to be just and right, but also easy to use.

Some people say we should look at the end of the choice. They think we should pick the thing that brings the most good to the most people. They believe that if the thing that happens is good, then the choice was good. This way of thinking looks at what happens after we act. It asks us to count the good and the bad parts of what might happen.

Other people say we should follow certain steps no matter what. They think some things are just wrong to do, even if doing them would bring good things. For them, the act itself is what matters. They have a set of things we should never do. They believe that being right is more important than getting a good thing to happen. This way of thinking looks at the act, not just the end.

Still other people say we should look at who we are. They think we should try to be a good person. They ask what a kind or strong person would do. They build their way to think on the kind of person they want to be. This way of thinking looks at the heart and mind of the person making the choice.

Each way has its own good points and its own hard parts. The way that looks at what happens can be hard because we cannot always know what will happen. The way that follows steps can be hard because sometimes the steps lead to bad things. The way that looks at who we are can be hard because people do not always agree on what a good person is.

So, when we build our own set of ways to think, we must think about these different ideas. We might put them together. We might say that some steps are always right, but we also look at what happens. We might also think about being a good person. The thing we want to reach is a way to think that helps us make choices we can stand by. We want to feel good about our choices even when they are hard. This is a long work, but it helps us live a better life.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response: First, you must stop and look at the person you want to act with. Second, you must think about what that person wants or what makes them feel good. Third, you must think about what you want to do. The thing after the third thing is to think about how what you do will change the things that the other person wants. The thing after that is to think about how the other person will see what you do and how they will feel about it. The thing after that is to think about what the other person will do after they see your act. The thing after that is to see if the thing you do will lead to a good end for both of you or if it will lead to a bad end. The thing after that is to change your own plan if you see that your plan will make the other person do something that is bad for you or bad for the whole group. Finally, you can move forward with your act when you feel that you know what will happen next.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why we should not always look for the very best way to do a thing. If we can find the best way, why would we stop before we should?

Person number two: Sometimes looking for the very best way takes too much time. If you spend all your time looking for the perfect thing, you might run out of the time you have to do anything at all.

Person number one: But if I find a way that is not the best, will it not be bad?

Person number two: Not always. If a way works well enough to get the job done, then it is good. Think about building a house. If you spend years trying to make every single piece of wood the best piece of wood in the world, you will never live in your house.

Person number one: I see. So you are saying that time is a thing we must think about when we make choices?

Person number two: Yes. We have a small part of time and a small part of things we can use. If we use every single thing to make one thing perfect, we will have nothing left for the other things we need to do.

Person number one: So, if I have many things to do, should I just find ways that work well enough and then move to the next thing?

Person number two: That is often the best way to live. You find a way that is good, you finish it, and then you move on. This lets you finish many things instead of finishing only one thing.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
To live a life that feels good by being a good person, think of it as a set of small steps that fit together like parts of a day. 

First, we see that a good person tries to make things better for other people. This can be as simple as giving a smile, sharing a small thing to play with, or listening when a friend talks. When we do these things, we help the other person feel safe and happy, and we also feel a warm feeling inside. 

Second, a good person tries to be just. This means not taking more than a just share, not saying things that are not true, and not hurting other people feelings on a set idea. If we see a chance to take something that does not belong to us, we think about how we would feel if we were the one who lost it, and we choose to give it back or leave it. 

Third, a good person looks after the things that matter to them, like family, friends, and the place they live in. This can be done by helping a parent with home work, calling a friend who seems sad, or picking up things that are not needed on a walk. By caring for these things, we keep them strong and can enjoy them for a long time. 

The next step after the third is that a good person learns from what happens. If we do something wrong, we think about why it happened, say sorry if we hurt someone, and try to do better next time. This keeps us from falling into the same way of doing wrong things and helps us grow. 

The next step after the next step after the third is that a good person tries to stay true to what they feel is right inside. When we feel a pull to do something that might hurt another, we stop and ask if that feeling is the same as the warm feeling we get when we help. If it is not, we choose the other path. 

When all these steps are put together, the life that follows feels full and good. It is not about having a lot of things or being given thanks by many, but about feeling that we have done what we can to make the world a little kinder and that we have been kind to me and my own. By being this kind of person, each day adds a small piece to a life that feels good, safe, and full of warm feelings.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what makes a person a person. We see that every person has a mind and a way of feeling things. This makes each person a thing that is special and has its own life. Second, we think about how we want others to act toward us. Most people want to be safe and want their own choices to be seen as good and important. Third, we see that if we do something very bad to another person, we take away their life as they know it. We might break their body or break their mind so they cannot be themselves anymore. The thing after the third thing, we look at what happens if everyone did these bad things. If everyone could do anything they wanted to hurt others, no one would ever be safe. The world would be a place of fear and pain that does not end. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that to live together, we must have some things that we do not do. We must agree that some ways of acting are not okay. This is not because of a book of laws, but because of how we must act toward each other to stay alive and stay whole. Finally, we see that we must never do these things because it would mean we are no longer living in a world where people can be free or safe. If we do these things, we end the very thing that makes life good for everyone.

english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
Imagine a world where we must choose how to help people. We want to make things good and stop bad things from happening. But we have a big problem. We do not have enough time, enough money, or enough food to help everyone. Because of this, we must make choices. We must decide which people get help and which people do not. This is a very hard thing to do.

The hard question is this: How do we choose who gets the most good? When we have to pick between helping one person or helping many people, how do we know which choice is the right one? How do we know if the good feeling of one person is the same as the good feeling of another person?

Some people say we should only look at all the good in the world put together. They think we should try to make the biggest number of good things happen. If helping ten people makes more good than helping one person, they will pick the ten people. They want the most good for the most people. To them, the best way is to count the good things and pick the path that gives us the biggest number.

Other people think this way is wrong. They say that every person is important in their own way. They think it is not right to use one person to make things better for others. They believe we have a must to look after people in a certain way. For them, it is not about the big number. It is about doing what is right for each person right now. They might say we should help the person who is in the most pain first, even if it does not help the most people in the end.

There are also people who think we should look at how much a person can do. They might think we should help a person who can then help many other people. They think this is a good way to make the good in the world grow. But this can lead to bad things, because it might mean we ignore people who cannot help anyone else.

Each of these ways of thinking has a different way of seeing what is good. First, one looks at all the good put together. Second, one looks at what we must do for each person. Third, one looks at how much good can grow from a single choice. There is no easy way to know which way is the best. We must keep thinking about it.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems
ugf_response: You did not give me the words that the person said. I cannot tell you what they say or if their thinking is good if you do not give me the words first. english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks they know things. A person might think they have a true and full picture of how the world works. This person might think their thoughts are the same as what is real. This is a problem because the person is not seeing the things they do not know. Second, we see that the person does not know what they do not know. This means there are many things that are true that the person has not seen. Third, when a person thinks they know everything, they stop looking for new things. They stop asking questions. This makes their mind stay small and not strong. The thing after the third thing, when a person makes a choice resting on a thought that is not true, they might hurt themselves or hurt others. The thing after that, the way to fix this is to always think that we might be wrong. We must always look for the things we have missed. This keeps our minds open and helps us find the truth.

english_query: why different situations need different kinds of good character
ugf_response:
To be a good person is not the same thing in every moment. You might think that being good means doing one thing all the time. But life is not one single thing. Life changes. Because life changes, the way you act to do the right thing must also change.

First, think about how you act with your friends. When you are with people you love, being good might mean being kind and soft. You might listen to them and make them feel happy. You might show that you care about their feelings. In this situation, being too hard or too strong might make things bad.

Second, think about a situation where you must lead a group of people to do a hard job. If you are too soft, the work might not get done. The people might not do what they must do to stay safe or to finish the work that was set for them. In this case, being good means being strong and making sure everyone follows the way that is needed. If you were only soft, you would not be doing the right thing for the group.

Third, think about a situation where you must tell the truth about something bad that someone did. If you are too kind to the person who did the bad thing, you might hide what they did. That would not be good. To be good here, you must have the power to not be afraid and tell what is true, even if it hurts someone.

So, we see that being good is not a single thing that stays the same. It is more like a set of ways to act. You must look at what is happening around you. You must see who is there and what the situation needs. A good person is someone who can see what the moment needs and then acts in that way. Being good means knowing when to be soft and when to be hard, when to be quiet and when to speak, and when to stay still and when to move. If you try to use only one way to act, you will not be able to do what is right in every part of your life.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Person 1: How can I know if someone is changing what was really said?

Person 2: You need to look for signs that the new words do not fit the true facts.

Person 1: What are some signs I should look for?

Person 2: First, see if the new words make the speaker look better than they did before.

Person 1: So if they make themselves look good, they might be lying?

Person 2: Yes, often they change the story to hide a bad thing they did.

Person 2: Then check if the new words are very different from the old ones.

Person 1: That helps. Is there anything else?

Person 2: Yes, watch their face and voice. If they act like they are scared or not calm, they may be hiding the truth.

Person 1: So I should look at their words, what they want to do, and their feelings?

Person 2: Exactly. All three things can tell you if they are changing the story.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why some ways of thinking make it hard to find new ways of thinking.

Person number two: It is because your mind can get stuck in a small space. When you think a certain way, your brain stays in that space and does not want to leave.

Person number one: Why does it stay there?

Person number two: Because the way you already think feels good and easy. It is like a path in the woods. Once you walk the same path many times, it is easy to follow. You do not look for new paths because the old one is right there.

Person number one: Does this mean I cannot see what is real if I am stuck?

Person number two: Yes. If you only look through one window, you will only see one part of the world. You might think you see everything, but you are missing the rest.

Person number one: How can I stop this from happening to me?

Person number two: You must try to look through many windows. You must ask yourself if what you think is the only way that is real. You must try to think in a way that feels hard or strange. This helps you break out of that small space.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
Person 1: I have a question for you. Why do people see new things in different ways?

Person 2: That is a good question. It happens because of what we already know and believe. We use our old ideas to help us understand new ones.

Person 1: So if I believe something is true, I will only see things that go with that idea?

Person 2: Yes, that is often what happens. Your mind looks for signs that are the same as what you think is right. It is easier for the mind to find things that agree with you.

Person 1: What about things that do not go with my idea? Do we just ignore them?

Person 2: We might try to ignore them. Or we might think they are wrong. It is hard to change what we believe. So we stick to what we know.

Person 1: That sounds like a bad spot to be in. How can we get out of it?

Person 2: You have to try hard to look at the other side. You must ask if you could be wrong. Then you can see the whole picture, not just the part you like.

english_query: why counting up good and bad results is harder than it sounds
ugf_response:
Person 1: I hear that adding up good and bad things is not as easy as it looks. Why is that?  

Person 2: When we try to add up good and bad things we first have to decide what we call good and what we call bad, and that can be different for each person.  

Person 1: So the way we name them can change the whole?  

Person 2: Yes, and also the same event can have both good and bad parts, so we have to break it into parts, and sometimes we miss a part.  

Person 1: What else makes it hard?  

Person 2: We often have many events at the same time, and we have to keep track of each one without putting them together.  

Person 1: Can you tell about a simple picture?  

Person 2: Imagine you have a group of many small wins and many small hurt. If you only look at the wins you think you are ahead, but the hurt may add up to the same size, and you have to add them both.  

Person 1: How do people try to do it better?  

Person 2: They write each thing down, put a good mark for good and a bad mark for bad, and then add the numbers, but they must be careful to put each mark in the right place.  

Person 1: So the hard part is keeping the marks right and not forgetting any thing?  

Person 2: Exactly, and also making sure that the way we call something good or bad stays the same while we count.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
Imagine you have a way to make things work better. This could be a way to make food grow fast or a way to make a machine run without stopping. You know how to do this thing. Now you must think about if you should tell everyone how you do it.

The hard question is this. Is it better to tell everyone everything so that everyone can do good things, or is it better to keep it to yourself to keep things safe?

Some people say you must tell everyone. They think that if everyone knows how to do something good, the whole world will get better. They think that if you hide what you know, you are stopping the world from moving forward. They believe that keeping things to yourself is like holding back the light from a dark room. To them, the best thing is to help as many people as you can, even if it means others might use what you know in a bad way.

Other people say you should be careful. They think that if you tell everyone, some people will use what you know to hurt others. They think that some things are too strong or could cause great fear for everyone to have. If you tell a person how to make a bad thing, they might use it to cause pain. These people think that keeping some things hidden from view is the only way to keep people safe. They believe that the good that comes from sharing might not be as big as the bad that comes from the wrong person using it.

There is also a third way of thinking. Some people think you should only tell people who can be trusted. They want to find people who will use what they know to help, not to hurt. But this is not easy because it is hard to know who is good and who is not. They must decide if the chance of being wrong is too high when they look at the chance to do good.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
When one person says some words and later another person says those words again but with a small change, we have to try to tell if the words have been moved or changed. The first person may have spoken in a quiet place, and the second person may be in a loud place, so the sound of the words can be hard to hear the same. We may hear only part of the first set of words, and the second set may have extra parts that were not there before. The hard question is how we can know if the second set of words is the same as the first, or if it has been changed a little or a lot, even when we cannot go back and hear the first one again.

One thought is to ask the first speaker to say the words again. If the first speaker can say the same words again in the same order, we have a sign that the second speaker has not changed much. Another thought is to have a note of the first words. If we can look at the note and see the same words, we can check if the second speaker has added or taken away any. Some people say that the way the voice sounds can also give a sign. A soft way of talking may hide a change, while a strong way of talking may make a change stand out. Others say that the way the words fit together, the order of the words, can help us see if something has been moved. If the order feels off, it may be a sign that the words have been changed.

Different people give different replies because they trust different ways. Some trust the ear and say that listening very close and asking for a repeat is the best way. Others trust the note and say that a note is the safest way to keep the words the same. Some think that the feeling behind the words matters, so they look at whether the feeling seems the same as before. They may say that if the feeling is not the same, then the words have been changed in meaning, even if the sounds look the same. Still others think that the group of people who heard the first set of words can all talk about what they heard, and if most of them say the same thing, then the second set of words is probably a good repeat. Each reply comes from a different way of looking at the problem, and each way has a reason that makes sense to the person who uses it. The whole problem stays a hard question because we do not always have a perfect way to catch every little change, and we have to decide which way to trust in each case.

english_query: when helping the group costs you but helps everyone
ugf_response:
Imagine a group of people who want to do something big together. To get this thing done, everyone must give something up. This might be their time, their money, or their own feeling of being well and easy.

First, we look at what happens to the person who gives. This person loses a part of what they have. They might feel tired or they might have less money to spend on themselves. This is a bad thing for that one person. It feels like a bad thing for them in that moment.

Second, we look at what happens to the whole group. Because this person gave something up, the group now has more power or more things to use. The thing that the group wants to do becomes possible. Because the group does what it wants to do, every person in the group gets something good.

Now we see the big idea. The person who gave something up has less, but the group has more. If every person in the group thinks only about themselves, no one will give anything. If no one gives anything, the group can never do the big thing. The group will stay small and not have much power.

But if people decide to give even when it is hard for them, the group becomes strong. The good thing for everyone is much bigger than the bad thing for the one person. This is how groups do things that are too big for just one person to do alone. It is a way to make the whole world better by asking each person to give a little bit of what they have.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Sometimes many people believe that a thing is true. You might think that if a lot of people say it, it must be the right way to see the world. This is not always the case. We must be careful not to believe things just because many people say so.

To understand why, we must look at how people think. People often look at what others are doing to decide what they should do or believe. If a large group of people acts a certain way, a person might think, they must know something I do not know. This is a way to stay safe and fit in with the group. However, this way of thinking can lead to being wrong.

First, we must see that groups can be wrong. In the past, many people believed the world was flat. They believed it because everyone they knew believed it. But the world was not flat. The many people were wrong. The number of people who believe a thing does not make that thing true. Truth does not come from how many people say it. Truth comes from what is real in the world.

Second, we must see how groups can change. People can become afraid or angry. When people feel these things, they might all start to believe the same wrong thing at the same time. They might follow a leader who says things that are not true. Because they are all acting together, they do not stop to think for themselves. They stop asking if the thing they believe is actually real.

Third, we must see that being part of a group can stop us from seeing the truth. If you want to be liked by your friends, you might not say when you think they are wrong. You might even start to believe the wrong thing just so you can stay with them. This means that even if the truth is right in front of you, you might not see it because you are too busy trying to be like everyone else.

So, how should we find what is true? We should not look at how many people believe a thing. Instead, we should look at the things that can be seen and felt. We should look for things that can be shown to be real. We must use our own minds to look at what is happening. We should ask if the thing is real, not if the group says it is real. To find the truth, we must be willing to stand alone if that is what the truth asks of us.

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response: First, we see that each person has a mind that can feel a feeling of happy and can feel hurt and can want things for themselves. Then we see that when we act as if a person is just a thing to get what we want, we do not think about that mind or those feelings. This makes the person feel hurt and can make them feel less safe. Next, we see that when one person does this to another, the other may stop trusting the first person. Trust is the feeling that we can count on each other and that we can work together. When trust goes down, groups of many people find it hard to work together and get less good things for all. Then we see that if many people start to think that it is okay to use each other like things we use, the whole group will feel less happy and will have less help for each other. This also means that each person will have the taking away of a chance to make their own choices and to live in a way that feels good to them. Because of the hurt, the taking away of trust, the less happy group, and the taking away of the chance for each person to choose, using people as if they are just things to use is always bad. This shows why we should always think of each person as a mind with feelings and not just as a thing to get what we want.

Person 2: Then you must trust the feeling deep in your body. It is okay to pick the one that feels right to your heart, as long as you have thought it through.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response: First, we look at a group of people who are all doing things at the same time. Second, we see that one person makes a change in what they are doing. Third, we see that this change makes the other people change what they are doing too. The step after that shows that the way one person acts can change the way the whole group acts. The step after that shows that this is a way to tell how things move from one person to another in a group. english_query: when it is good enough to pick something that works instead of the best thing
ugf_response:
The first idea is that sometimes a thing is good enough to use. This thing does not have to be the very best thing that can be made or found. It just has to do what it needs to do. The second idea is that when we pick this good enough thing, we do not spend all our time or all our money trying to find the best thing. This is what the person thinks follows from the first idea. They think we can save our power and our things for other jobs.

To see if the thinking is good, we must look at how the parts fit together. The first part is true because we cannot always have the best of everything. If we tried to make everything the best, we would never finish anything. The second part is also true because saving our things helps us do more. However, we must be careful. If we pick something that is too low in how well it works, it might break or fail. If it fails, we will lose more than we saved. So, the way of thinking is good only if we know where to stop looking for the best and where to start using what we have.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who says something with a very strong voice. They look at you with eyes that say they know everything. They do not have any feeling that they might be wrong in their heart. They feel that what they say is the only way the world can be. Because they feel this way, they think they are right. This is how many people act. They think that if they feel sure, then the thing they think must be true.

But here is the hard question. Does feeling sure about a thing make that thing true? Just because a person has no feeling that they are wrong, does it mean they have found the truth?

There are many ways to look at this. First, some people might say that feeling sure is a good way to find what is true. They think that if you think very hard and your mind feels very clear, you have found the right path. They believe that the feeling of being sure is a sign that you are right.

Second, other people think this is a bad way to think. They say that the human mind can be wrong in many ways. A person can feel very sure about something that is not true at all. A person can see things that are not there or believe things that are not real. If a person only looks for things that make them feel sure, they might miss the truth. They might only see what they want to see.

Think about a person who thinks the sun moves around the earth. For a long time, people felt very sure about this. They saw the sun go up and go down every day. Their eyes told them it was true. They felt no feeling that they were wrong. But they were wrong. The earth moves around the sun. Their feeling of being sure did not change what was actually happening in the sky.

So, we see that being sure is just a feeling inside a person. It is not a way to check if a thing is real. To find what is true, we cannot only look at how we feel. We must look at the world and see if what we think is the same as what is actually there.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response:
Person one: I want to be a better person. How can I do this?

Person two: You can change who you are by changing the things you do every day.

Person one: But I feel like I am just the way I am. Can doing things really change my heart or my mind?

Person two: Yes. When you do something many times, it becomes a part of you. If you act like a kind person, you will start to feel like a kind person.

Person one: So if I want to stop being a person who is always angry, I should try to act calm instead?

Person two: That is right. If you choose to act in a calm way, your mind will begin to follow. The things you do lead to the way you think.

Person one: Does it take a long time to see this change?

Person two: It takes a long time. You must do the new things many, many times before they feel easy and real.

Person one: So the things I do are like the small things you put in the ground that grow into something big?

Person two: Yes. The things you do are the ways you build yourself. If you build with good things, you will become a good person.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response:
The first idea is that people should only do things that follow things everyone could say yes to. This means that before you do something, you must ask if every person in the world could say yes to that thing you do. If even one person could not say yes, then you should not do it.

The second idea is what follows from this first idea. It says that if we want to know how to act, we must look for those things that all people can say yes to. We should not use our own wants or our own ways of seeing the world to decide what is good. Instead, we must look for the things that stay the same for every person.

Now we must look at if the thinking is good. There is a problem with this way of thinking. It is very hard to find things that every single person can say yes to. People have many different ways of living and many different ways of seeing what is right. Because of this, it might be a thing that cannot happen to ever find any way to act that everyone can say yes to. If we can never find such things, then we will never know how to act. This makes the first idea hard to use in the real world. It might be too hard to find a way to live that is good for every person at the same time.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
You have a set of ideas in your head about how the world works. These ideas are like a set of glasses that you put on your eyes. When you look at something new, you do not see it as it is in its real state. Instead, you see it through these glasses. The glasses change the way the new thing looks to you. If your glasses are blue, everything you see will look blue. If you think that all people are bad, you will look at a new person and see only the bad things they do. You will not see the good things because your eyes are looking for what you already think is true.

The hard question is this. How can we ever know what is real if we can never take off our glasses? If everything we see is changed by what we already believe, how do we know if our ideas are right or wrong? It is hard to see the truth when our own minds are working to make the new thing fit into our old ideas.

Some people might say that we should try to stop thinking about what we already know when we see something new. They might say we should try to be like a clean piece of paper. They think that if we can clear our minds, we can see things as they are. But this is very hard to do. It is something that cannot be done.

Other people might say that we should use our old ideas to help us understand. They think that without our old ideas, a new thing would be too hard to understand. They say that we need our old ideas to give us a place to start. To them, the old ideas are like a map. Even if the map is not the very same as the land, it is better than having no map at all while you walk through a dark forest.

Third, a group of people might say that we should always look for things that show our old ideas are wrong. Instead of looking for things that make us feel right, they say we should look for things that make us feel wrong. They think that if we find something that does not fit our glasses, we must change the glasses. They believe that the only way to get closer to the truth is to find where we were not right.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
When you know something, it is often good to tell other people. Telling others what you know can help them become better and help the whole group do better. But there are times when telling every single thing you know is not the best thing to do.

First, we must think about what happens if you tell a person who wants to use your words to hurt you or others. If you have a way to make something work or a way to stay away from pain, telling a bad person could let them use that thing to cause pain. In this way, keeping some things to yourself is a way to keep people from being hurt.

Second, we must think about how much time and how much power you have to do things. If you spend all your time telling everyone everything you know, you might not have time to learn new things or to do the work that needs to be done. To do great work, you must sometimes sit alone and think. If you are always talking and sharing, you might lose the power to think in a way that goes far into a thing.

Third, we must think about the people you are talking to. Not everyone is ready to hear everything. If you tell a person something that is too hard for them to understand, they might get confused or even believe things that are not true. It is better to give people only what they can use right now. This helps them get bigger and better in a way that makes sense to them.

The one thing after the third thing is the matter of how people work together. Sometimes, if everyone knows everything at the same time, people might stop trying to find their own ways to think. If you give the answer too soon, the other person might not learn how to find the answer themselves. By waiting, you help them get bigger in their minds.

So, while sharing is good, you must use your mind to decide when to speak and when to stay quiet. You must think about how to keep people from being hurt, the time you have, the mind of the person listening, and how people get better.

english_query: when helping the group costs you but helps everyone
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a question about doing something that helps everyone but makes things hard for me.

Person number two: I can tell you about that. It is when you give up something that you need so that the whole group can be better.

Person number one: Why would someone do that if it makes their own life harder?

Person number two: People do it because they want the whole group to stay strong. If everyone only thinks about what they want, the group might break into many small pieces and not be one thing anymore.

Person number one: But if I lose something important, does that not make the group less able to do things in the end?

Person number two: Not if what you give up is small and what the group gets is big. If you give a little bit of your food so that everyone can eat, the group stays alive. If the group stays alive, you will have food again later.

Person number one: So it is a way to make sure the whole group wins even if one person loses a little bit right now?

Person number two: Yes. It is about looking at the big picture instead of only looking at yourself. It is a way to make the world work for everyone.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
The first thing we see is the starting point. This point says that all people are of the same kind when it comes to what is right and what is wrong. It says that no one person is better or more important than another when we think about how to live well. This is the first idea.

The second thing we see is what follows from the first idea. If all people are of the same kind, then the way we tell people how to act must be the same for every person. We cannot have one set of ways for one group and a different set of ways for another group. This is the second idea.

The third thing we see is whether the way they think is good. To know if the thinking is good, we must look at how the first idea leads to the second idea. If it is true that all people are of the same kind, then it must be true that the ways of living must be the same. The path from the first idea to the second idea is straight and clear. If the first idea is true, then the second idea must also be true. However, if the first idea is not true, then the second idea might not be true either. The power of the whole thing rests on the first idea.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response:
Sometimes we want to know if a thing will happen in the future. We do not know for sure because we cannot see the future. However, we can look at what is happening now and what has happened before to make a good guess. This is how we find out if a thing has a high chance to come to be or if it has a low chance to come to be.

First, we look at the things that are happening right now. We look at the way things move and the way things act. If we see that a ball is moving toward a wall, we can guess that it will hit the wall very soon. We do not need to see it hit the wall to know it is going to happen. We use what we see to make a guess about what will happen next.

Second, we look at what has happened many times before. If every time we drop a stone it falls to the ground, we can say we have a very good reason to think the next stone will also fall to the ground. We do not need to see the next stone fall to know it will happen, because it has happened every single time in the past. When something happens the same way over and over, we can trust that it will happen again.

Third, we must think about how much we know. If we have many pieces of information that all point to the same thing, our guess becomes strong. If we have only one small piece of information, our guess does not have much power. If we have many pieces of information that all say the same thing, we can feel very sure about what will happen.

We must also think about the things that could change. Sometimes, a new thing can happen that makes our guess wrong. If we think a stone will fall, but then someone catches it, our guess was wrong. We must always remember that our guess is not the same as knowing the truth for sure. We are only using what we know now to guess what will happen later. When we have many good reasons and many pieces of information that all point the same way, we say we have a very good reason to believe a thing will or will not happen.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response:
The person says that there are some ways to act toward other people that you must never do. This is the first idea. They say that even if doing a bad thing would bring a great good to many people, you still must not do that bad thing to one person. This is the second idea. They think that if we say it is okay to hurt one person to help many, then we lose the ground we stand on for what is good. This is the third idea. They think that if we do not have these things that we must never do, then no one is safe at all. This is the idea after the third idea.

Now we look at what they think follows from these ideas. They think that we must have a set of things that are always wrong. They think that we cannot just look at how much good comes from an act to see if the act is good. Instead, they think we must look at the act itself. If the act is a thing that should never be done, then it is wrong even if it makes many people happy.

Now we look at whether the thinking is good. To see if the thinking is good, we must see if the first and second ideas lead to the third and the idea after the third in a way that makes sense. The first idea is a starting point. The second idea tells us how to use that starting point. If we say some things are always wrong, then it follows that we cannot use those things to get a good end. This part of the thinking is strong because the steps go one after the other in a way that fits. However, one might ask if the first idea is real and true. If we cannot agree that some things are always wrong, then the whole way of thinking falls down. The thinking is good if you agree with the starting point, but it is hard to show that the starting point is the only way to see the world.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response:
The first part of this thought is what the person says is true. They say that when one person does a thing, it can make other people change what they do. This is the starting point. It is the thing they see as a fact in the world.

The second part is what they think comes after that first part. They think that if one person can change what others do, then we can see how people act together by looking at how one person acts alone. They think that the way one person moves can show us how the whole group will move.

The third part is whether the way they think is good. To see if the thinking is good, we must ask if the first part always leads to the second part. It might be true that one person changes others. But it might not be true that we can know everything about the group just by looking at one person. People are not like small pieces of wood that always move the same way when you push them. People have their own thoughts and ways of being. Because of this, the thinking might not be strong enough to be always true.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
Before you do something, you must stop and think about what the other person will do when they see what you do. This is a way to see into the future by using what you know about how people work.

First, you must look at what you want to do. You must see your own plan clearly. Second, you must imagine that you are the other person. You must look at the world through their eyes. You must think about what they know and what they do not know. You must think about what they want and what they fear.

Third, you must ask yourself what they will think when they see your move. If you do the first thing, how will they feel? Will they feel happy or will they feel angry? If they feel angry, what will they do next? Will they fight you or will they walk away?

The thing after the third thing is this. You must think about their next move. If they fight you, what will you do then? If they walk away, how does that change your plan? You must keep doing this in your head. You see your move, then you see their move, then you see your next move after that. You keep going back and back in your mind like a game.

The thing after the thing after the third thing is this. You must look for the best way to win or the best way to stay safe. You do not just pick a move because it feels good right now. You pick a move because you have seen the many steps that come after it. You choose the path where the things that happen next are good for you.

By doing this, you are not just acting. You are seeing the whole story before it even starts. You are using your mind to see the many ways the story could go, so you are not surprised when things happen.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
The first idea is that all people are tied to one another in some way. This means that what one person does can reach and touch another person. The second idea is that because we are tied together, we have a need for other people to live well. This part says that we cannot be alone and still be okay.

From these two ideas, the person thinks that we must take care of each other. They think that because we are not alone, we have a thing we must do to act in ways that help the group. They think that the way we act toward others is the most important thing we do.

We can look at if this way of thinking is good. The first part about being tied together is something that can be seen in the world. If one person gets sick or if one person is very rich, it changes things for the people around them. So, the first idea is strong. The second part about needing others is also something that most people feel is true. We need food, we need houses, and we need people to talk to.

However, we must look at this with great care. Just because people are tied together does not mean there is only one way they should act. Some might say that even if we are tied together, the most important thing is what each person wants for themselves. The person who made the case thinks that being tied together means we must act for the good of everyone. This is a way of thinking that many people like, but it is not the only way to think. It is a way that rests on the idea that the whole group is more important than one single person.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Many people think that if a lot of people say something is right, then it must be right. That idea sits in the middle of a hard question. The hard question asks if we should take something as true just because many people think it, or if we should look for something else that tells us it is true. The question is hard because it makes us think about what we use to tell us what is right and what is not.

One answer that some people give is that we should go with what many think. They say that a big group of people can see many parts of a thing that one person may miss. They feel safe when they hear the same idea from many voices, and they think that many heads have checked it and found it true. They may also say that if most of the people we know and trust think it, then it is a good sign that it is true.

Another answer that other people give is that we should not take a thing as true just because many think it. They point to times in the past when many people were sure about something that later turned out not to be true. They think of times when many people said the world was flat, or when many people said a certain thing could make better a sick thing but it did not. They say that the number of people who think something does not fix the thing itself. They say we need to look at other ways to see if it fits with what we can see, what we can check, and what we can understand.

Why do the two groups give different answers? The first group trusts the feeling that many people have looked at the thing and have not found a reason to say it is wrong. They may feel that many people can catch wrong things that one mind may miss. The second group trusts the feeling that many people can also miss things together, that a group of many people can all be led by the same wrong idea, and that we need to use other ways, like looking at it with my own mind or checking it with other known facts, to see if it holds up.

In the end, the hard question does not have a single simple answer. It asks each of us to think about why we trust what we hear, how we can check it, and when we should let a view of many people lead us or when we should step back and look for another way to know. The answer may change from case to case, and it asks us to keep thinking and not stop at the first easy answer.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response: First, we look at the signs we have seen in the past. Then we see if those signs are like the ones we see now. This means we can guess if the same thing will happen again. Next, we check if we have a lot of these signs or just a few. If we have many signs that point to the same thing, we have good reason to think it will happen. If we have no signs or signs that point to different things, we do not have good reason to think it will happen. This shows that our guess rests on how many signs we have and how clear they are. Finally, we understand that having good reason does not mean the thing will for sure happen, but it means we can expect it to happen more than not.

english_query: why saying something over and over does not make it true
ugf_response: First, the first idea says that a fact does not change just because a person says the same words many times. Second, the second idea says that many people think the other way: they think that hearing a thing a lot can make it feel true in the mind, so they may start to believe it even if it does not fit with what really is. Third, the third idea says that this is a wrong idea, because the truth of a thing needs what actually happened or what can be shown, not how often the thing is spoken. From these ideas the person thinks that we should not let the number of times a thing is spoken decide whether we accept it as true. They think we should check the thing against things we can see or know, and we should be careful not to be pulled just by hearing it a lot. This line of thinking is good because it points out a normal wrong thing that can lead people to believe things that are not right. The real check of a thing is not how loud or how often it is said, but whether it fits with what we can see, hear, or count.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
The person starts with a first idea. This idea says that all people are of the same great weight. They say that no person is better than another person in the way they should be seen or acted toward. This is a thing that many people believe is true.

The second idea is that if we make a way for people to live together, that way must be the same for every person. They say that if a way of doing things is good for one person, it must be good for all people. If we make a way that only helps some and hurts others, then that way is not a good way.

The third idea is what they think comes from these first two ideas. They say that because all people have the same great weight, we must make the ways of doing things the same for everyone. They think that if we do not make the ways the same, we are saying that some people have more weight than others. This would be a bad thing to do.

Now we must look at if the thinking is good. The first idea is a good starting point. Most people agree that people should be seen with the same care. The second idea also makes sense. If a way of living is meant to work for a group, it should work for everyone in that group.

However, we must ask if the third idea follows from the first two. It is possible to have ways of doing things that are the same for everyone but still hurt some people more than others. Let us say that everyone must walk a long way to get food. That is the same way for everyone. But for a person who cannot walk, that way is much harder than it is for a person who can walk. So, while the person is right that we should see everyone as having the same great weight, making every way the same for everyone might not be the best way to take care of everyone. The thinking is good in its heart, but it might not be the only way to reach a good end.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response: First, we must look at what it means to follow the ways people say we should act. We often have a set of ways that tell us what is right and what is wrong. If we only follow these ways because we must, we are just doing what we are told without thinking about the people around us. Second, we see that these ways are often made to keep things good for everyone. If a person follows the ways but does not care about others, they might find ways to do what is told while still making people feel great pain. Third, we see that a person can follow every way and still do things that make people feel very bad. To show this, a person might follow a way that says they must keep all their money, and they do this in a way that is the very same as what was asked, but they do it while watching other people die because they have no food to eat. Next, we see that the heart of what is good is not just in the ways we follow, but in how we feel about other living things. If we have no care for others, the ways we follow become empty and do not bring the good they were meant to bring. Finally, we can see that following the ways without care is not enough because the ways are only a way to help people, and if we do not care about people, the ways lose their true meaning.
